title: TerminatorStar (T*)
description: AI Manhunt / Hunter Bot system for Minecraft featuring intelligent AI entities with A* pathfinding for tracking and chasing players.
body:
![AI MANHUNT and T*](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/99426b0963b4f96ce95ab45a68416e23a166d910.png)

T* is a Fabric mod that adds intelligent Manhunt-style AI bots to Minecraft.

These bots can track players across difficult terrain using optimized pathfinding, fight with normal Minecraft mechanics, and be managed individually or in groups through commands or an in-game control panel.

The mod is designed to make it easy to create Manhunt challenges, AI survival scenarios, bot battles, or chaotic singleplayer and server experiences — especially when you want the action without needing a full group of friends.

---
![Feature](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14a360aa42baf753238aa8cdd4e81f67f55a0f04.png)

## Chaos Vocals

T* includes a full **Chaos Vocals** system for funny, unpredictable gameplay moments.

You can enable or disable the feature whenever you want.

![Option For Vocals](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dced5c8fd9883fe818e1a5ff2278d1df7381a57a.png)


---

## Advanced Pathfinding

Bots use an optimized **A\*** pathfinding system built for Minecraft terrain.

- Navigates complex environments
- Handles uneven terrain and obstacles
- Performs parkour-style movement
- Clears gaps with sprint jumps

Pathfinding runs asynchronously to help reduce server lag and keep TPS stable, even with multiple bots active.

![A* debug path](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d0abd33655fc303704a70c7ab5bdfebba5772dc5.png)

---

## Combat AI

Bots follow normal Minecraft combat rules while still being dangerous and adaptive.

- Performs line-of-sight raytracing before attacking
- Uses Ender Pearls to close distance
- Can fight with Crossbows and Tridents
- Supports configurable difficulty levels

Server owners can adjust how aggressive, accurate, and fast the bots behave.

---

## Bot Groups and Roles

Bots can be organized into groups with different roles and behaviors.

- **Hunter** groups chase players
- **Escape** groups avoid targets
- Groups can fight other groups

Bots also keep their targets and group settings across deaths and dimension changes.

---

## Control Panel

An in-game control panel can be opened with the **`O` key**.

![Spawn bots menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e4c338974431aa5bd1c73930e13773dee8130cb.png)

The keybind can be changed in Minecraft’s controls menu.

On servers, you must be an **operator** to use it.

---

## Command System

Server operators can control bots through the `/bot` command tree.

### Example commands

```mcfunction
/bot create <name> [amount]
/bot target <player>
/bot remove <name>
/bot list
```
--- 
### Use Cases

- T* is great for:

- Minecraft Manhunt challenges
- AI survival scenarios
- Server events
- Bot battles
- AI gameplay experiments
---
### Requirements
Fabric Loader
Fabric API
Simple Voice Chat


- Disclaimer : The mods is in work in progress and if it's in beta or alpha, expect bug !
